Document:
# Vampire: Hemomancer
[color=#990000][italic]"Blood is not evidence - blood is a tool..."[/italic][/color]
Hemomancer is the zone control and blood magic class. You shine when you: prepare the arena, manage distance, force fights on your terms.
## Role in the Round
[bold](Trap hunter)[/bold]: cut off routes with barriers and force bad pathing. [bold]Clinical predator[/bold]: you don't always need to finish the job — sometimes a clean bite, reset, repeat is best.
## Abilities (Total Blood Threshold | Cost)
[bold](150 | 30)[/bold] Vampiric Claws You channel blood magics to forge deadly vampiric claws that leech blood and strike rapidly.
[bold](250 | 25)[/bold] Blood Tendrils After a short delay, hits a 3×3 area. Heavy slow + poison — perfect for a safe bite or a clean escape.
[bold](250 | 40)[/bold] Blood Barrier Places multiple blood barriers, only you can pass through them. Use them to create “pockets” and cutoffs to buy time.
[bold](400 | 30)[/bold] Sanguine Pool Briefly turns you into a blood puddle. Great for escaping, changing angles, and slipping past obstacles.
[bold](600 | 20)[/bold] Predator Sense Helps track prey/targets. Especially useful once the station is alert.
[bold](800 | 100)[/bold] Blood Eruption Causes nearby blood to erupt, severely damaging anyone standing on it. A fightswinger: set up blood beforehand or force bleeding.
[bold](1000 | (toggle) )[/bold] Blood Bringers Rite Ultimate aura that makes nearby people bleed and rejuvenates you. Requires full power (high total blood and enough unique victims), otherwise it won't activate.
